assumptions.title: 3-Scene Linear Spine Structure
assumptions.default: Three scenes in fixed sequence with variant content within each

assumptions.title: Lars Is Encounter NPC, Not Party Member
assumptions.default: Demo party is Kael + Elena + Kade; Lars is merchant encounter

assumptions.title: Scene Text Is Narrative Prose
assumptions.default: Scene text field contains prose descriptions, not dialogue trees

assumptions.title: Combat Transition Out of Scope
assumptions.default: Scene 3 ends with nextSceneId=null; combat init is integration logic

decisions.title: Gate Threshold Strategy
decisions.context: Player starts at ~16.67% per trait. Scene 2 gates after 1 choice, Scene 3 after 2. NPC party members (Elena, Kade) have fixed personalities that never change.
decisions.user_input: Moderate gates. Confirmed NPC party members keep fixed personality values.

decisions.title: Flag Naming Convention
decisions.context: Flags track player choices across scenes, checked as prerequisites. Need consistent, self-documenting names.

decisions.title: Choices Per Scene
decisions.context: Determines content volume and pacing. Each scene needs at least 1 ungated choice as fallback.

decisions.title: Rogue Encounter Intensity
decisions.context: ADR-029 says Rogues are low-level background presence in early scenes. Scene 2 market disturbance is the Rogue seed moment.
options: A: Direct Rogue NPC with dialogue
B: Indirect presence (thief with Rogue symbol)

decisions.title: Gym Town Name
decisions.context: Setting name for the tournament town in the demo. Cosmetic but adds world-building polish.

decisions.title: Scene Text Length and Tone
decisions.context: Prose length and narrative voice for scene text field. Affects demo pacing and atmosphere.
